channel.title: GitHub Starlark Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Starlark in GitHub

item.title: rabbitmq/rabbitmq-server
item.description: Open source RabbitMQ: core server and tier 1 (built-in) plugins

item.title: envoyproxy/data-plane-api
item.description: [READ ONLY MIRROR] Envoy REST/proto API definitions and documentation.

item.title: cncf/xds
item.description: xDS API Working Group

item.title: aspect-build/rules_js
item.description: High-performance Bazel rules for running Node.js tools and building JavaScript projects

item.title: bazelbuild/rules_docker
item.description: Rules for building and handling Docker images with Bazel

item.title: googleapis/googleapis
item.description: Public interface definitions of Google APIs.

item.title: aspect-build/rules_swc
item.description: Bazel rules for the swc toolchain https://swc.rs/

item.title: aspect-build/rules_lint
item.description: Run static analysis tools with Bazel

item.title: kurtosis-tech/ethereum-package
item.description: A Kurtosis package that deploys a private, portable, and modular Ethereum devnet

item.title: cncf/udpa
item.description: 🌌📊✈Universal Data Plane API Working Group (UDPA-WG)

item.title: bazeltools/bazel_jar_jar
item.description: JarJar rules for bazel (rename packages and classes in existing jars)

item.title: bazelbuild/rules_foreign_cc
item.description: Build rules for interfacing with "foreign" (non-Bazel) build systems (CMake, configure-make, GNU Make, boost, ninja, Meson)

item.title: DataDog/rules_oci_bootstrap
item.description: Bazel rules to bootstrap from an OCI registry

item.title: DataDog/rules_oci
item.description: blazing fast Bazel rules for building OCI Images

item.title: bazelbuild/rules_python
item.description: Bazel Python Rules

item.title: ash2k/bazel-tools
item.description: Reusable bits for Bazel

item.title: grpc/grpc-proto
item.description: gRPC-defined protobufs for peripheral services such as health checking, load balancing, etc.

item.title: bazelbuild/bazel-central-registry
item.description: The central registry of Bazel modules for the Bzlmod external dependency system.

item.title: GoogleContainerTools/distroless
item.description: 🥑 Language focused docker images, minus the operating system.

item.title: bazel-contrib/rules_oci
item.description: Bazel rules for building OCI containers

item.title: bazelbuild/rules_apple
item.description: Bazel rules to build apps for Apple platforms.

item.title: bazelbuild/examples
item.description: Examples for Bazel

item.title: google/bazel-common
item.description: Common functionality for Google's open-source libraries that are built with bazel.

item.title: bazelbuild/rules_nodejs
item.description: NodeJS toolchain for Bazel.
